titleStmt.title: SII 11.177: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 177. (A.R. No. 458 of 1926.) MUGAD, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE TANK BUND.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Śaka 1047, Viśvāvasu, Pushya, śu. 5, Friday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The date appears to be irregular. Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti in Viśvāvasu fell on Friday, 25th December, A.D. 1125; but the tithi was ba. 14 and not śu. 5 as stated. The record states that Mahāsāmanta Bammadēva had the grant of land previously made by his uncle Mahāsāmanta Mārtaṇḍayya for the upkeep of a tank inscribed on stone. Bammarasa and his cousin Nākarasa were descended from Chāvuṇḍarāya, the Nārgāvuṇḍa of Muguda Thirty, situated in Mahārājavāḍi-nāḍu, a sub-division of Palasige Twelve-Thousand. Tribhuvanamalla Gūvaladēva of the Kadaṁba family is stated to have been governing Palasige Twelve-Thousand and Koṅkaṇa Nine-Hundred at the time of the grant. The record was composed by the poet Nāgārjuna-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē © svasti sa
mastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru
vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravardhdhamāna mācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhī śvaraṁ
haradharaṇīprasūtatriḷōcanakadaṁbānvayavaṁśōdhayācaḷaśikharāyamānamārttaṇḍamārtta ṇḍakarā
titībranijapratāpavaśīkṛtapracaṇḍamahīmaṇḍaḷa vairimaṇḍaḷikamadevēdaṇḍagaṇḍasthaḷakhaṇḍa napaṭiṣṭhani
ṣṭhurabhujadaṇḍa pagemuṭṭegaṇḍa nenūnadānavārisaṁtarppatesakaḷavibudhajanasasya nuttuṁ gasiṁha
lāṁcchana vānaramahādhvaja permmaṭṭitūryyanirgghōṣaṇa caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭhi tāṣṭādaśāśva
mēdhadīkṣādīkṣitakuḷaprasūtamahima himavadacaḷaśikharasthāpitamahāśaktipra
bhāva vairībhakaṇṭhīrava malegebhrerava cāgajagajhaṁpaḷācāryya kīrttimārttaṇḍa mūrttinārāyaṇa vairigha
raṭṭa maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭa śrīmattribhuvanamallaṁ gūvaladēvarasaru palasige pannircchāsiramumaṁ koṁ
kaṇa Oṁbhaynūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanarāgi pāḷisuttamire sakala halasige pannircchāsi
radoḷage mahārājavāḍināḍeṁbudu bhūlalanālapana madakke tilaka venippudu muguda mūva tteṁduṁ ©
Ā mūvattakkaṁ mattī mēdini pogaḷe nagaḷe nārggāvuṇḍaṁ cāvuṇḍarāyaneṁboṁ śrīmahimakaraṇḍa neni
si jasamaṁ taḷedaṁ © keṟe bāvi basadi dēgula maravaṭṭige satrameṁba dharmma mavinituṁ naṟedavu
mugudamūvattaṟa vibhu cāvuṇḍarāyaniṁdaṁ jagadoḷ © Ā cāvuṇḍana kulavadhu vācāravisuddhe sa
kaḷadharmmaprayeyā dācaṭṭiyakka nesedaḷu bhūcakraṁ pogaḷe tanna mahimōṁnnatiyaṁ © Ā yirvvarggaṁ puṭṭi
da nāyatabhujavikramaṁ parārtthadoḷaṁ saṁśrīyoḷa madhikanu māda najēyaṁ śrīnāgadēva naṁba mahātmaṁ ©
Ātana kulavadhu gaurige sītege rukmiṇige guṇadoḷu migilenipīmāteseye polliyakkaṁ bhotaḷamaṟiya
l sakaḷaguṇanidhi yādaḷ © v® © Ava rirvvargga manēkapuṇyadodavuṁ peṁpuṁ manōrāga dutsavamuṁ kīrttiyu mai
meyuṁ manujarūpākāradiṁ puṭṭuvantevo laṁteyde muguṁdanā ḍosevinaṁ sāmāntamārtaṇḍa nībhuvanaṁ baṇnise pu
ṭṭidaṁ vibhavadiṁ sāmantavidyādharaṁ © madavadvairiya naṭṭi koṁdu sereṇeṁ dudbhītaraṁ kādu bēḍida nānāvidha yā
cakergge siriyaṁ sālvannegaṁ māḍi yaggada kīrtyaṁganelōka delleḍegaḷo ḷgaṁgāṁganā kāre saṁpadamaṁ tāḷdire peṁpuvettu vesa
mantamārttaṇḍana © kaṁ © mārttaṇḍa tottaḷaduḷideseva kīrttiyuṁ digmukhado ḷvartisa leseva mugundada mā
prakaṭisidaṁ © Ā mārttaṇḍana tammaṁ bhīmabhujaṁ surigeyaṁkakāṟara dēvaṁ cāvuṇḍarāyaneṁbī nāmaṁ
geseyaleseva jasamaṁ paḍedaṁ © v® © biḍuva maraḷcu vaṭṭuva maguḷvā kaḍaṁguva poṁgu vāntu rūpiḍuva jaguḷva jhaḷpisu
pāruva mikku pokku pokkaḍasuva kuttu mittuva vidai nūrmmaḍi yenalāytu kā
cavuṇḍano ḷājiraṁgadoḷ © ka © surigeviḍivavara dēvaṁ surigeyo ḷāṁtiṟiva gaṇḍadallaḷa veṁbī biru deseyu
ttire cāvuṇḍarāyano ḷkaḷado ḷanjadavaṁ palavankaṁ © Ā māttarṇḍana vadhu saśrīma himākāre puṇyavati guṇavati sa
tkōmaḷe patibhakteyanippī maimeya gūjjiyakka neṁba ḷpesariṁ © gaṁgādiśāntaradiṁ gaṁgānadī bando ḷaṇna rūpuve
tta ḷenalsaṁgatadi gojjiyakkaṁ gaṁgeyena ltānamaleya gaṁgeyu mādaḷ © v® © caṇḍa valeyaṁ pogaḷirppa muguṁdada kīrtti
vetta mārttaṇḍana kānte peṁpi nabhimānada rūḍiya gāḍiyēḷge kaikoṇḍire dānadharmmaguṇa meṁbivaṟiṁ desadiḻda go
jjigāvuṇḍi caritradiṁ maleya gaṁgeyena lpesarvvetta ḷurvviyoḷ © Odavida sadguṇa prabaḷasaṁhatiyiṁ bageya
lke sīteyeṁbudu girijāteyeṁbudu sarasvatiyeṁbudu konti madriyeṁbudu sale gaṁgeyeṁbudu su
ḷōcanayeṁbudu bhūmidēviyeṁbudu vuśādēviyeṁbudu ghaṭāntakiyeṁbudu gojjiyakkanaṁ © mudadiṁ
raṁbeya celvumaṁ ratiya saśriṁgāramaṁ gauri yaggada saubhāgyamaṁ gaṁgevunna tiva nantā sīte tāneyde tāḷdida cāritrapatibratā
guṇamumaṁ tānāydu dhātrīmuguṁdade mārttaṇḍanakāntayaṁ paḍedanī śrīgojjigāvuṇḍiyaṁ © rāvaṇaniṁde
sīte pesarvvō ṇeyiṁde gauri tānāvaga meṁdu mātuvaḍedirdda ḷena lnere gojjiyakkano ḷtīvida satpatibratada sa
jjanavṛttige sīte va rssamānaveṇeveṁbude neṁdoḍe dōṣa kaṁ . yeraḍaneya sītēyāda ḷpuru
ṣabratadimda vamaḷasadguṇagaṇadiṁ deraḍaneya gangeyāda ḷparamēśvari gojjiyakka nintījagadoḷ © puruṣam mā
rttaṇḍaṁ satpuruṣaṁ jīvadeyva mesava kuladeyvaṁ saccaritaṁ caritama denisida paramaguṇaṁ gojjiyakkano ḷpara
maguṇaṁ © parivārakkaṁ prajegaṁ nirutaṁ tāṁ deyvamāgi śiṣṭēṣṭarigaṁ surabhiyavolāge peṁpaṁ dhariyisida ḷgo
jjayakka nunnati yesayal © v® © parahiteyeṁdu putravatiyeṁdu mahāsatiyeṁdu dharmmado ḷparisareyeṁ
du dānanidhiyeṁdu guṇōnnatayeṁdu lakṣmi gāgara venisirppa puṇyavadhuveṁdu patibrate yeṁdu sadā saccaritapavitre
yeṁdu dhare baṇni sutirppudu gojjiyakkanaṁ © va © Aṁtenisi negaḷda sāmaṁtamārtta ṇḍaṁgaṁ mahāsatiyuṁ puṇyavatiyu mi
nasāsanadēvateyuṁ maleya gaṁgeyu menisi negardde śrīmat gojjikabbegāvuṇḍigaṁ mahādēvangaṁ gaurigaṁ svāmikā
rttikaṁ puṭṭuvaṁte nārāyaṇadēvangaṁ śrīyādēvategaṁ kāmadēvaṁ puṭṭuvante kontigaṁ dēvēṁdraṁga varjjunaṁ puṭṭuvante © v® ©
caduroḍavuṭṭe lakṣmi samakaṭṭe guṇaṁ guḍigaṭṭe bīrado ḷodavi podaḷdu vairigaḷa nārddeṟeyaṭṭi negartte kī
rtti vormodale digantarāḷamane muṭṭe calaṁ neṟe puṭṭe nākigā nnati puṭṭu
vaṁdadiṁ © ka © kīrtti voḍavuṭṭe karṇnaṁ mārttaṇḍaṁ geseye puṭṭidaṁdade siriyuṁ kīrttiyu modave muguṁdada mārtta
ṇḍaṁ geseye puṭṭidoṁ nākarasaṁ © v® © Arisāmantara raktameṁba navasandyārāga murbbēḷe sākṣaranīrējavanakke po
®de harṣaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭacakrāṁka mādaradiṁ poṁde muguṁdameṁ budayaśaiḷasthānado ḷtījamāgire ceḷvādudu nāki
rājavibhu veṁbādityanityōdayaṁ © giriyoḷmēruve pūjya maṁbudhigaḷo ḷdugdhābdhi pūjyaṁ mṛgōtkarado
ḷsiṁgame pūjyavānegaḷo ḷairāvatave pūjya vābharaṇānīkado ḷalte māṇikame pūjyaṁ bhūribhūlōkado ḷpiri
(ri)duṁ pūjya nenippa noppi palaba rssāmantero ḷnākigaṁ © Eradoṁ gā karṇa nīga ḷdiṭame magurddu baṁdiṟdanaṁbante raudrā
jirado ḷniṁdāntavaṁ gā javane munidu baṁdiṟda neṁbante tannaṁ saraṇeṁdiṟdaṁge sāvillada manujagatisthāna meṁbantirī nāka
rasaṁ sāmantaratnaṁ nagardda nanupamaṁ vīralakṣmīviḷāsaṁ © sāsanamāgi rūḷpesava kallina sāsanamoṁ didaltu kēḷsāsada
sāsanaṁ jayada sāsana vārppina sāsanaṁ guṇōdhbhāsanasāsanaṁ siriya sāsana voḷpina sāsanāḷiyiṁ lēsene nākirā
javibhu sāsanakōṭiya neyde tāḷdidaṁ © ka © visasanado ḷtōḷsāyira desakamumaṁ nosala kaṇnumaṁ tōṟuvanaṁ basadṛśa me
nisuva bīrada masakakke pinākiyenisuvaṁ nākarasaṁ © visasanameṁ baḍavigaḷū ḷmasakade mārmmaleva vairisarabhama nuṟe
kōḷmasagi koltirppa sāmanta sarabhabhēruṇḍa nanisidōṁ nākarasaṁ © Ā kupitavairima danapinākaṁge viśāḷakīrttivaḷayitadaśadiglō
kaṁge muguṁdade vibhu nākaṁ geṇeyoḷare vibhuga ḷinnuṁ munnuṁ © nākange jaina dharmmapatākaṁge virōdhisaivyasaṁharakōpōdrē
kaṁge samastaguṇānīkaṁge samānavoḷare mānavanikaraṁ © māḍisu vāyatanaṁga ḷmāḍisu vāhāradānadharmmaguṇaṁga ḷmāḍi
suva keṟega ḷinituṁ māḍave sāmanta nāki gāyuṁ śrīyaṁ © Eraḍanaya dharmmajaṁ pannaraḍaneya visuddharudra naydeneya
mahāsaranidhi yīraydeneyā paramanidhānaṁ dharatriyo ḷnākarasaṁ © sāmantasūdrakaṁ ripusāmantara naṭṭi kolva su
bhaṭara dēvaṁ sāmantaratna nenisida sāmantaṁ nākirāja nārjjitatējaṁ © svasti samadhigata pañcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta vija
yalakṣmīkānta . Ativiṣamaturagārūḍhaphauḍharēvanta . vairikṛtānta . Āhārābhayabhaiśajya śāstradānavinōda mallikāmō
da . muguṁdadāditya . sāmantajanasaṁstutya . Abhinavasūdrakavīra . vīrāvatāra . Ari birudagāvaṇigadiśāpaṭṭa . vīralakṣmī
lalāṭapaṭṭa . birudasāmantasarabhabhēruṇḍa . monamuṭṭegaṇḍa . sāmantamārttaṇḍanaṁka kāṟa . birudagāvaṇigasūṟekāṟa . vidagdhamu
gdhāṁganāmanōja . vaṁdijanakalpabhūja . vairisāmantakaṁdakuddāḷa . birudagāvuṇiga karṇnasūḷa . maccaripa sāmantamadana
triṇētra . gōtrapavitra . sāmanta mārttaṇḍana gandhavāraṇa . biruda sāmantamadanivā raṇa . catussamayasamuddharaṇa . biru
dagāvaṇigasaṁharaṇa . sāmantadēvēṁdra . sāmantanāgēṁdra . sāmantavidyādharēṁdra sāmantadānavēṁdra . sāmantaratna . sāmanta
tiḷaka . paramajinacaraṇasarasīruhabhṛṁga . nayyanasiṁga . śrīmat gojjikabbegāvuṇḍiyare ṇuṁga . sāhasōttuṁga . nāmādisa
mastaprasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ nākarasara © v® © Ātana tamma natyadhikatēja nidirccida vīravairisaṁ
ghātamadaprabhaṁjana naśēṣakaḷāvida nartthisankuḷaprītikaraṁ jinēṁdrapadapaṁkajaṣaḷpada
namma lōkavikhyātavenalke bammarasa nārjjisidaṁ praje mecce kīrttiyaṁ . sthiranē mē runagēṁdradiṁ dacaḷitaṁ
gaṁbhīranē kṣīrasāgaradiṁdaṁ migi lartthigīvaneṁba bāppammamma kānīnaniṁ piriyaṁ rūpi ye kantuviṁdadhikṛtaṁ sā
mantarabhairavaṁ paranārīsuta namma bamma nadaṭaṁ cāvuṇḍarāyātmajaṁ . samadhigatapaṁca mahāśabda ma
hāsāmanta sakaḷalakṣmīkānta nijakuḷakramāyātavīralakṣmīrakṣitadakṣiṇadōrddaṇḍa . maccaripagā
naṇigasarabhabhēruṇḍa . saṁgarāṭavīnikaṭaharmmadōgrārigāvaṇiga gajabēṁṭekāṟa mārtta ṇḍa naṁka
kāṟa . Anēkasamarasaṁghaṭṭa kēḷīdōhaḷārātisāmantamadanivāraṇa . gojjiyakkana gaṁdha vāraṇa
viṣamasūkaḷahayārūḍhaprauḍharīvanta . śrīmajjayakēsidēvarāmādēśapēṣaṇahanmanta . dhavaḷa
vimaḷakīrttyaṁganāvallabha bhayalōbhadurlabha . jinacaraṇasarasīruhabhṛṁga . rāyana siṁga . nāmādisamasta
prasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ bammadēvaṁ tammayyaṁ mahāsāmantaṁ mārttaṇṇayya keṟege biṭṭa gaddeya sīmā
byājavāgade caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi śiḷāśāsanamaṁ barayisidaṁ . sakavarṣa 1047 neya viśvāva
susaṁvatsarada puṣyasuddha 5 sukravāradaṁdi nuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātada puṇyatidhiyaṁdu .
keṟeyaṁ paḍisalisuvantāgi gaddeyaṁ biṭṭarā gaddege sīme yāvudene . nairityade sīme kāruge geṟeya nīrottu Alliṁdaṁ baḍaga
mogade vāyāvyakkaṁ baḍagaṇada mōṭeya daṇḍeya sasivakke naṭṭakallu . Alliṁdaṁ mūḍamogade . cikkōḍageṟeya horeya lī
śānyadalu naṭṭa kallu taṁkamogade Āgnēyadalu naṭṭakallu . Āgaddeyiṁ teṁkaṇa haḷagallu . Adakke mane mūḍaṇa gange
ya hareyallu . mūvattu kai nīḷa virppatta nālku kaiyagala vintinitumaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi naḍeyisuvar .
Ī dharmmama narasaru vaṟuvattokkaluṁ kādoḍuvar . Ī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁdaṁ prati pāḷisidātaṁ vā
raṇāsi kurukṣētradalu sāyirakavileyaṁ . sāsiravēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ
dānamaṁ koṭṭa phalaṁ . Ī dharmmamanaḷidāta (.) nanibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ tapōdhanaruma(ṁ) nāpaṇyakṣītra
daḷida mahāpātakaṁ . kaṁda . keṟegēnu biṭṭa gaddege keṟeyaṁ kāgiṇiyanappadeṁ koṇḍātaṁ neṟe liṁgamanūḍadeṁ
heggeṟeyalu nīru(ṁ)ṇba gōkulaṁgaḷa naḷidaṁ . Ida nāvanorbba naḷidavanu Udadhivṛtā khiḷadharitriyoḷagaṇa
jīvāspadama naḷidaruṇajaḷamaṁ padapiṁ dīṇṭidana gatiya neydade māṇaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma sētu rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kā
lē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarbbānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Ā keṟeya keyyaṁ keṟeya kelasakke hattu gadyāṇakke variṣaṁprati māṇivesaṁ hōge kaiyirppattuThere is space for three
nelavesaṁ kai hattu © dharamandaducchēdaṁ Ā guḷavāṟu kallagalavaregai kalla bu guṇḍavattaṁ Ittalu sandhivā
ḷe baḷivese ninitumaṁ dātāraru naḍeyisuvaru . kalveseda kaṭṭaṇaṁ tirddade hattugadyāṇakke varalu keṟege paḍisalikeya tōrpparu .
nāgārjjunapaṇḍitaru pēḷda kabbaṁ kesaṟu kallādiyāgi kallōjhara kelasa . bharatōjana kaṇḍaraṇe . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
